lotteryDescription: Your future home in the heart of Downtown Brooklyn at 165 Willoughby Street. The building sits in an exciting urban environment where modern living meets easy access to culture, transit, and work, within the city’s vibrant business hub and a rapidly evolving residential neighborhood. From studios to two-bedroom apartments, each home features a washer and dryer, dishwasher, and high-end kitchen appliances. Enjoy premium countertops and finishes, air conditioning, and smart heating and cooling controls. Residents at 165 Willoughby Street have access to a full suite of amenities, including an indoor rock-climbing wall*, lounge area*, a media and VR room*, a game room*, a business center*, and a rooftop terrace*. A spa* and pool* are available, offering a mini retreat within the comfort of home. (*fees apply). 2 pets allowed up to 60lb, restricted breeds. Tenants are responsible for electricity, including electric stove and heat. Rent includes hot water.

lotteryDescription:
Elevated living in Brooklyn at Botanic Heights - 960 Franklin Avenue, a striking new residential community bringing 91 affordable apartments to one of the borough’s most vibrant neighborhoods. Residences feature dishwashers and private patios or balconies. Residents can enjoy an electronic doorman, elevator access, and online payment options. An optional amenity package is available for $75/month for one-bedroom residents and $125/month for two-bedroom residents, and includes access to the yoga studio, coworking room, party room, social lounge, and children’s room. Additional optional amenities include a fitness center ($50/month), and on-site parking ($400/month).
Applicants can install and use washer/dryers for a surcharge, which may be set by applicable law. One pet per household (up to 20 lbs.) is permitted with no pet deposit required; service animals are welcome!
Tenants are responsible for electricity, stove, and electric heat/cool split unit. Hot water is included in the rent.

lotteryDescription: Willow Tree Residences is Project Renewal and Monadnock Development’s newest supportive and affordable housing development, located in Manhattan Community Board 6. Willow Tree Residences includes 130 residential units, 51 of which are being marketed; a community room; a landscaped outdoor terrace; common area, in-unit high speed broadband internet; and social services for residents. A health care clinic on the ground floor will serve residents and community members with primary care, behavioral health, dental care, and other health care services. Households who meet the income and household size requirements listed in the table below are encouraged to apply. Tenant is responsible for electricity and including electric stove. Rent includes heat and hot water. Transit: 4/5/6/7, M15, M42, M101, M102, M103, LIRR, Metro North

The development consists of units ranging from studios to four-bedrooms. The amenities include a Bike Room, Community Room, Tenant Lounge, Outdoor Terraces, Fitness Rooms, Children’s Playroom, Dishwasher, Card operated laundry room*, Energy efficient appliances, Free in-unit Broadband Internet, Parking spaces available on a first-come first-serve basis* (*additional fees apply)Transit: 2/5/6/, BX5, BX6, BX19, BX46. Rent includes heat and gas for cooking. Tenant responsible for electricity. No fee to apply • No broker’s fee • Smoke-free building

lotteryDescription:
Welcome to 1938 Prospect Avenue Apartments, a thoughtfully designed residential community offering modern living with an exceptional collection of amenities tailored to enhance your everyday lifestyle, combining comfort, convenience, and contemporary design. Each apartment features high-end kitchens with premium appliances, smart-controlled heating and cooling systems, and access to high-speed internet. Residents enjoy a wide range of building amenities, including a landscaped backyard, recreational room, bike storage lockers, laundry service, shared car services, common area Wi-Fi, and an intercommunication entry system — all within a welcoming community.
No pets are allowed with service animals as an exception.

Tenant is responsible for electricity, including electric stove and electric heat and electric hot water.

lotteryDescription:
Experience a new standard of luxury living at 534 Third Avenue Apartments, where modern design, upscale amenities, and unbeatable convenience come together — all at rents priced between 60%–85% below the free-market apartments!
These apartments feature in-unit washers and dryers, dishwashers, and spacious layouts — all in a pet-friendly building welcoming 1 pet up to 50 lbs. with no pet deposit required. Service animals are always welcome.
Residents may also enjoy an optional $175/month amenity package including a fitness center*, sauna*, outdoor yard*, lounge*, club room*, game room*, business center*, and furnished roof deck* with stunning city views.
Additional conveniences include a package room, shared laundry room* ($3 per wash), and bike storage lockers* ($25/month).
Near transportation, shopping, dining, and entertainment, 534 Third Avenue offers the blend of comfort, convenience, and affordability!
Tenants are responsible for electricity, including electric stove and heat.

lotteryDescription:
Welcome to 1060 Prospect Avenue in the Bronx.

This newly constructed building offers shared coin-operated laundry facilities.
Bike storage lockers are available for an additional monthly fee of $50.
Pets are welcome, subject to a 40-pound weight limit. A refundable pet deposit of $300 is required.

Tenant is responsible for electricity, including stove, hot water, and heat.

lotteryDescription: In the heart of Downtown Brooklyn, 104 Fleet Place is a modern mid-rise residential building offering both comfort and style, featuring contemporary layouts and expansive windows that fill each home with natural light. The building is primarily located, with immediate access to transit options, local dining, parks, and cultural attractions. Residents enjoy access to a thoughtfully curated collection of amenities*, including private parking*, a fully equipped fitness center*, a media lounge*, a children’s play area*, and modern co-working spaces*, along with additional recreational offerings designed for convenience and lifestyle. A dedicated wellness experience is also available at the spa retreat*, which includes a swimming pool* and jacuzzi*, offering a calm escape. (*fees apply) 2 pets allowed up to 60lb. Breed restrictions apply. Tenants are responsible for electricity, including stove and heat. Rent includes hot water.

lotteryDescription:
Welcome to 269 Van Cortlandt Avenue East Apartments! 
This newly constructed building features studios, 1-bedroom, and 3-bedroom affordable apartments with contemporary layouts. Each unit is designed with comfort and convenience in mind, making it ideal for families seeking quality city living. 
Stepping through the door carries a deep feeling of comfort and home.
No pets are allowed in this building; service animals are an exception. 
Tenant is responsible for electricity, including the electric stove, and heat. Hot water is included in the rent.

Rialto West is a newly constructed mixed-income rental building in Hell’s Kitchen offering studio, one-, two-, and three-bedroom apartments. Located near public transit, dining, and shopping, the property features a fitness room, laundry room, broadband internet access, and a pet-friendly policy (restrictions apply; 40 lb. maximum). The building includes a ground-floor arts and community space operated separately by IndieSpace. The space is intended for public-facing arts/community use and is not a residential amenity or exclusive resident space. The building is also located next to a new public open space. Tenants are responsible for electricity. Manhattan Community Board 4 preference applies.
 
To request an application by mail, send a self-addressed, stamped envelope to: Rialto West, c/o Clinton Management, 42-06 235th Street, Douglaston, NY 11363.

lotteryDescription:
Defined by its striking white façade, 343 Himrod Street offers contemporary residences in the heart of Bushwick, a neighborhood known for its artistic identity, industrial charm, and its growing collection of acclaimed restaurants, cafés, and cultural venues. The thoughtfully designed two-bedroom residences feature modern finishes, spacious layouts, and carefully curated details that balance style and comfort. Residents can enjoy an array of amenities, including a state-of-the-art fitness center*, resident workspace*, game room*, and a beautifully appointed sundeck*, creating inviting spaces to work, unwind, and connect with neighbors (*Fees may apply).
 One pet is allowed, up to 30 lbs. Tenant is responsible for electricity, including stove and heat. Rent includes hot water.

Residents have access to premier amenities*, including private parking*, a well-equipped fitness center*, a media lounge*, a kids’ playground*, and modern co-working spaces*, along with additional recreational areas*.
